prose:
Formaldehyde frontier-orbital gap — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz`. SCF converged. HOMO = -7.6523067 eV, LUMO = -1.7826355 eV → **gap = 5.8696712 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not an excitation energy).
Command: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --charge 0 --mult 1 --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmps3039962/live.json`.
No warnings reported.
